mapper.select: SELECT data_date AS dataDate, source, metric_type AS metricType, SUM(value) AS dailyTotal FROM trend_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND data_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY data_date, source, metric_type ORDER BY data_date

SELECT data_date AS dataDate, keyword, source, metric_type AS metricType, SUM(value) AS dailyTotal FROM trend_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND data_date >= #{startDate} GROUP BY data_date, keyword, source, metric_type ORDER BY keyword, source, data_date
